source_independence.reason: The review structures a single management disclosure and does not independently verify the forecasts.

schema_gaps.problem: Estimate v0.1 requires a single numeric value and cannot faithfully represent management guidance expressed only as a range.
schema_gaps.decision: Preserve the tax-rate guidance as a Claim with a structured range. Do not invent a 17% midpoint estimate.
schema_gaps.candidate_change: A future schema version should support point, bounded range, and point-with-tolerance estimate shapes.

summary.conclusion: The outlook is source-anchored and structurally separated, but not independently verified.
